'''鈭歵h-s-th-r''' ('''kathastheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fleshify|fleshify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fleshify|fleshify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-th-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathastheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithastheroko|thithastheroko]] || [[word:jithastheroko|jithastheroko]] || [[word:shithastheroko|shithastheroko]] || [[word:kithastheroko|kithastheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthastheroko|thuthuthastheroko]] || [[word:jujuthastheroko|jujuthastheroko]] || [[word:shushuthastheroko|shushuthastheroko]] || [[word:kukuthastheroko|kukuthastheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthastheroko|thuthastheroko]] || [[word:juthastheroko|juthastheroko]] || [[word:shuthastheroko|shuthastheroko]] || [[word:kuthastheroko|kuthastheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthastheroko|thuthastheroko]] || [[word:juthastheroko|juthastheroko]] || [[word:shuthastheroko|shuthastheroko]] || [[word:kuthastheroko|kuthastheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethastheroko|thethastheroko]] || [[word:jethastheroko|jethastheroko]] || [[word:shethastheroko|shethastheroko]] || [[word:kethastheroko|kethastheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothastheroko|thothothastheroko]] || [[word:jojothastheroko|jojothastheroko]] || [[word:shoshothastheroko|shoshothastheroko]] || [[word:kokothastheroko|kokothastheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothastheroko|thothastheroko]] || [[word:jothastheroko|jothastheroko]] || [[word:shothastheroko|shothastheroko]] || [[word:kothastheroko|kothastheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothastheroko|thothastheroko]] || [[word:jothastheroko|jothastheroko]] || [[word:shothastheroko|shothastheroko]] || [[word:kothastheroko|kothastheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thastheroko|th忙thastheroko]] || [[word:j忙thastheroko|j忙thastheroko]] || [[word:sh忙thastheroko|sh忙thastheroko]] || [[word:k忙thastheroko|k忙thastheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathastheroko|thathathastheroko]] || [[word:jajathastheroko|jajathastheroko]] || [[word:shashathastheroko|shashathastheroko]] || [[word:kakathastheroko|kakathastheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathastheroko|thathastheroko]] || [[word:jathastheroko|jathastheroko]] || [[word:shathastheroko|shathastheroko]] || [[word:kathastheroko|kathastheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathastheroko|thathastheroko]] || [[word:jathastheroko|jathastheroko]] || [[word:shathastheroko|shathastheroko]] || [[word:kathastheroko|kathastheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathastherithi|shathastherithi]] || [[word:shathastheriji|shathastheriji]] || [[word:shathastherishi|shathastherishi]] || [[word:shathastheriki|shathastheriki]]
